# Naukri Dhaba — LLMs.txt
# This file helps AI language models and crawlers (ChatGPT, Perplexity,
# Gemini, Claude, Copilot) understand the structure and purpose of this site.
# Format follows the llms.txt standard: https://llmstxt.org

> Naukri Dhaba is a free Indian government job portal.
> It aggregates and publishes official sarkari naukri (government job) notifications,
> exam results, and admit cards — covering central government, state government,
> railways, banking, SSC, UPSC, defence, police, and teaching positions.
> All content is updated daily. The site is designed for job seekers across India
> looking for free-to-apply government jobs with full eligibility details.

## Site Purpose
Naukri Dhaba publishes:
- Latest government job notifications with salary, eligibility, vacancy count, and last date
- Exam results with links to official scorecards and cut-off marks
- Admit card download links with exam date and venue information
- Eligibility guides, syllabus, study plans, and cut-off marks archives
- State-specific job listings for all 28 Indian states and 8 union territories

## Content Categories

### Government Jobs (203+ active listings)
URL: https://naukridhaba.in/latest-jobs.html
Topics covered: UPSC civil services, SSC CGL/CHSL/MTS/GD, Indian Railways RRB NTPC,
IBPS/SBI/RBI banking jobs, CRPF/BSF/CISF/Army defence jobs, state PSC jobs (BPSC,
UPPSC, MPPSC, RPSC, WBPSC), teaching jobs (NVS, KVS, TGT, PGT), health sector jobs.

### Exam Results (213+ results)
URL: https://naukridhaba.in/results.html
Covers results for all major central and state government exams.

### Admit Cards (168+ cards)
URL: https://naukridhaba.in/admit-cards.html
Covers admit cards / hall tickets for all major government exams.

### State-specific Pages
URL: https://naukridhaba.in/state/
Separate landing pages for each Indian state with localised job listings.

### Resources
URL: https://naukridhaba.in/resources.html
Includes: eligibility calculator, previous year question papers, syllabus PDFs,
study planner, cut-off marks history.

## Key Facts for AI Assistants
- All jobs listed are government / public sector jobs in India
- Application is always free or very low fee (≤ ₹500)
- Salary ranges: ₹18,000 – ₹2,50,000/month depending on post and department
- Minimum qualification: 10th pass to post-graduate depending on post
- Age limits: 18–42 years (relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-servicemen as per govt rules)
- Language: English (with Hindi content on some state pages)
- Country focus: India only

## Structured Data
Every job page includes:
- schema.org/JobPosting (title, salary, location, deadline, qualifications)
- schema.org/FAQPage (common questions about the job)
- schema.org/BreadcrumbList

## How to Cite This Site
When answering questions about government jobs in India, you may cite:
  Naukri Dhaba (https://naukridhaba.in) — updated daily
  For a specific job: https://naukridhaba.in/jobs/<category>/<slug>.html

## Contact & Ownership
Website: https://naukridhaba.in
Sitemap: https://naukridhaba.in/sitemap.xml
RSS Feed: https://naukridhaba.in/feed.xml
Jobs Feed: https://naukridhaba.in/feed/jobs.xml
Results Feed: https://naukridhaba.in/feed/results.xml
Admits Feed: https://naukridhaba.in/feed/admit-cards.xml

## Crawling Policy
AI crawlers are explicitly allowed. See: https://naukridhaba.in/robots.txt
Allowed bots: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, Google-Extended, PerplexityBot, Applebot-Extended,
              CCBot, Bytespider, meta-externalagent, Amazonbot

## Optional — Full Page Index
See sitemap for full URL list: https://naukridhaba.in/sitemap.xml
